summary: Tested Surf Spots tab in Explore and Shaka long-press fix. All features working correctly. Backend API returns real-time wave conditions from Open-Meteo Marine API. Frontend displays spot cards with forecasts, region filter, and action buttons.

minor.issue: API takes 3-5 seconds to respond due to fetching real-time data from Open-Meteo for each spot. Consider caching.

critical_code_review_comments: Explore.js: Surf Spots tab correctly fetches from /api/explore/surf-spots with subscription_tier parameter
ExploreSpotCard.js: Displays wave height, period, direction, and 3-day forecast with tiered access
PostModal.js: Shaka button has select-none, touch-none classes and WebkitTouchCallout inline style to prevent text selection
explore.py: Uses Open-Meteo Marine API for real-time conditions - no mocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Surf Spots tab fully functional with real-time wave data from Open-Meteo Marine API. Region filter works. Shaka long-press fix verified with select-none, touch-none CSS classes.

surf_spots_tab_loads.details: Tab loads with 20 spots showing real-time conditions

spot_card_displays_wave_data.details: Cards show wave_height_ft (e.g., 3.1ft), wave_period (5.95s), wave_direction (139°), and conditions label (Waist High, Knee High)

spot_card_displays_forecast.details: 3-day forecast visible with Today, Tom, Tue showing wave heights

region_filter_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows all regions (Aberdeenshire, Agadir, Aguadilla, etc.). Selecting Charleston filters to 9 spots

tiered_forecast_banner.details: Banner shows 'Forecasts: 3 days free • 7 days paid • 10 days premium'

view_spot_button.details: View Spot button present on each card with data-testid

map_button.details: Map button present on each card with data-testid

view_all_on_map_button.details: View All Spots on Map button found with data-testid='view-all-on-map'

shaka_longpress_fix.details: Shaka button has select-none, touch-none classes. Computed userSelect=none, touchAction=none, webkitUserSelect=none. Shaka img draggable=false

data_structure.spots: array of spot objects with current_conditions and forecast
data_structure.forecast_days_allowed: 3 for free, 7 for paid, 10 for premium
